case_title: 245 LEAVENWORTH STREET LP VS. DEMETRIO CARRILLO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 245 LEAVENWORTH STREET LP SERVED JUN-28-2013, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
